row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: The ego vehicle is moving forward along a curved road, approaching an intersection.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects (buildings, poles) on the left and right; green lines suggest lane boundaries curving to the right.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime driving scene showing a multi-lane road curving to the right. There are modern buildings on the left, grassy areas with trees on the right, and traffic infrastructure like poles and lights.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp details.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: The camera moves smoothly forward, maintaining consistent perspective and scale of objects as expected in real-world driving.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain stable and do not flicker or disappear unexpectedly.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and environmental structures remain continuous without warping or distortion.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curve.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions are visible; the path ahead appears clear.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar layout to Row 1: road curving right, buildings on left, trees/grass on right. However, visual fidelity is lower.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some elements appear slightly blurred or less defined compared to Row 1. Colors are somewhat muted.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion is generally smooth but exhibits minor jitter or instability in texture rendering over time.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though some edges show slight wavering or ghosting effects.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains largely intact but shows subtle warping near boundaries and distant objects.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion mimics forward progression along the curve, consistent with Row 1.
decision.risk_context: No overt risk indicators, though reduced clarity may affect downstream perception reliability.

missing_or_weakened_elements: Fine detail in textures (e.g., foliage, pavement)
artifacts_or_instabilities: Minor edge warping near curbs and poles
